title: Why Trump Thinks He's 'Most Powerful Person To Walk This Planet'
summary_full: The post, written by a ‘Dave King’, compared Trump’s influence with some of history’s most well-known rulers and military leaders, including William the Conqueror, Genghis Khan, Napoleon and Alexander the Great.
